steps.t: Garvir has asked you to assist in the cleansing of Gaerlond to the north-east. Fell creatures have been sighted and are scaring the workers.
You should report your success at Gaerlond to Garvir. Garvir can be found at Barad Rill.
Garvir told you that Herion once again needs your help. You should talk to Herion at Parth Rest. Parth Rest can be found to the north.
